home.typing_text_0: EXPLORE THE WORLD OF ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
home.home_desc: Explore AI rankings, update the latest AI tools and news. 4AIVN shares practical knowledge to help you use AI more effectively in your daily work.
home.top_tools_desc: A curated list of the most popular and influential AI tools.
home.ai_assistance: Now you can work <primary>faster</primary> and <primary>more conveniently</primary> with the help of AI.
home.ai_assistance_desc: AI automates repetitive tasks, analyzes complex data, and provides insights to help you make better decisions and focus on what truly matters.
home.ai_agent: AI Agents will become increasingly easier to <primary>use</primary> and <primary>access</primary>.
home.ai_agent_desc: AI Agents are becoming more accessible to non-technical users and can utilize specific data and knowledge provided by users to support their work precisely as desired.
home.latest_news_desc: Stay updated with the latest AI advancements and discussions.
